glosses.en: disliking / not wanting / unwilling (to do) / reluctant

sentences.reading: わたくしはさかながきらいです。

tokens.explanation: First-person pronoun referring to the speaker, serving as the topic.
Topic marker, indicating that 'I' is what the sentence is about.
Noun indicating the object of dislike.
Subject marker linking 'fish' to the adjective 'disliked'.
Na-adjective expressing the speaker's feeling of dislike.
Polite copula that formalizes the statement.

sentences.target: 彼は宿題を嫌がっている。
sentences.reading: かれはしゅくだいをいやがっている。

translations.en: He is reluctant to do his homework.
translations.es: Es reacio a hacer su tarea.
translations.fr: Il est réticent à faire ses devoirs.
translations.de: Er macht nur ungern seine Hausaufgaben.
translations.it: È riluttante a fare i compiti.
translations.pt: Ele está relutante em fazer sua lição de casa.
translations.he: הוא לא שש להכין שיעורי בית.
translations.vi: Anh ấy miễn cưỡng làm bài tập về nhà của mình.
translations.ar: إنه متردد في أداء واجبه المنزلي.
translations.nl: Hij is terughoudend om zijn huiswerk te maken.
translations.hu: Nem szívesen csinálja meg a házi feladatát.
translations.hi: वह अपना होमवर्क करने के लिए अनिच्छुक है।
translations.el: Είναι απρόθυμος να κάνει την εργασία του.
translations.nb: Han er motvillig til å gjøre leksene sine.
translations.sv: Han är ovillig att göra sina läxor.
translations.cs: Zdráhá se dělat své domácí úkoly.
translations.da: Han er tilbageholdende med at gøre sit hjemmearbejde.

tokens.explanation: Third-person pronoun referring to a male subject.
Topic marker indicating 'he' is the topic.
Noun representing what is being disliked.
Direct object marker linking 'homework' to the verb.
Te-form of '嫌がる', showing the action of disliking in a continuous aspect.
Auxiliary indicating the progressive aspect, that he is continuously disliking.

sentences.target: 雨の日は散歩に行くのが嫌だ。
sentences.reading: あめのひはさんぽにいくのがいやだ。

translations.en: On rainy days, I don't want to go for a walk.
translations.es: En los días lluviosos, no quiero salir a caminar.
translations.fr: Les jours de pluie, je n’ai pas envie d’aller me promener.
translations.de: An regnerischen Tagen möchte ich nicht spazieren gehen.
translations.it: Nei giorni di pioggia, non ho voglia de fare una passeggiata.
translations.ko: 비 오는 날에는 산책을 하고 싶지 않습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 下雨天，我不想出去散步。
translations.yue: 下雨天，我唔想出去散步。
translations.ru: В дождливые дни мне не хочется идти на прогулку.
translations.pt: Em dias chuvosos, não quero dar um passeio.
translations.he: בימים גשומים אני לא רוצה לצאת לטיול.
translations.vi: Vào những ngày mưa, tôi không muốn đi dạo.
translations.ar: في الأيام الممطرة ، لا أريد الذهاب في نزهة على الأقدام.
translations.nl: Op regenachtige dagen wil ik niet gaan wandelen.
translations.uk: У дощові дні не хочеться виходити на прогулянку.
translations.hi: बरसात के दिनों में, मैं टहलने नहीं जाना चाहता।
translations.pl: W deszczowe dni не chce mi się iść na spacer.
translations.el: Τις βροχερές μέρες, δεν θέλω να πάω μια βόλτα.
translations.nb: På regnværsdage vil jeg ikke gå en tur.
translations.id: Pada hari-hari hujan, saya tidak ingin berjalan-jalan.
translations.sv: Under regniga dagar vill jag не gå på en promenad.
translations.ro: În zilele ploioase, nu vreau să ies la plimbare.
translations.cs: V deštivých dnech se mi nechce chodit na procházku.
translations.da: På regnvejrsdage har jeg ikke lyst til at gå en tur.
translations.fi: Sateisina päivinä en halua lähteä kävelylle.

tokens.explanation: Noun indicating the weather condition.
Genitive particle linking 'rain' and 'day' to form 'rainy day'.
Noun specifying 'day'.
Topic marker indicating 'rainy day' as the topic.
Noun representing the action of walking.
Particle indicating purpose ('for a walk').
Verb meaning 'to go'.
Nominalizer turning the preceding clause into a noun phrase.
Subject marker linking the nominalized phrase to '嫌だ'.
Adjectival expression meaning that going for a walk in the rain is unpleasant.

sentences.target: 田中さんは犬を触るのを嫌がる。
sentences.reading: たなかさんはいぬをさわるのをいやがる。

translations.en: Tanaka is reluctant to touch dogs.
translations.es: Tanaka es reacio a tocar a los perros.
translations.fr: Tanaka est réticent à toucher les chiens.
translations.it: Tanaka è riluttante a toccare i cani.
translations.pt: Tanaka está relutante em tocar em cães.
translations.vi: Tanaka miễn cưỡng chạm vào chó.
translations.nl: Tanaka is terughoudend om honden aan te raken.
translations.hi: तनाका कुत्तों को छूने के लिए अनिच्छुक है।
translations.el: Ο Tanaka είναι απρόθυμος να αγγίξει τα σκυλιά.
translations.nb: Tanaka er motvillig til å røre hunder.
translations.sv: Tanaka är ovillig att röra hundar.
translations.ro: Tanaka este reticent să atingă câinii.
translations.cs: Tanaka se zdráhá dotýkat se psů.
translations.da: Tanaka er tilbageholdende med at røre ved hunde.

tokens.explanation: Proper noun referring to Mr./Ms. Tanaka as the topic.
Topic marker indicating 'Tanaka-san' as the topic.
Noun representing what is being touched.
Direct object marker linking 'dog' to the verb '触る'.
Verb meaning 'to touch'.
Nominalizer turning the verb phrase into a noun phrase.
Direct object marker linking the nominalized phrase to '嫌がる'.
Verb meaning 'to feel dislike', describing Tanaka-san's reaction.

Tanaka is reluctant to touch dogs.

かれはしゅくだいをいやがっている。
あめのひはさんぽにいくのがいやだ。
たなかさんはいぬをさわるのをいやがる。
